name: Master Ball
description: The best Poké Ball with the ultimate level of performance. With it, you will catch any wild Pokémon without fail.

name: Ultra Ball
description: An ultra-high-performance Poké Ball that provides a higher success rate for catching Pokémon than a Great Ball.

name: Great Ball
description: A good, high-performance Poké Ball that provides a higher Pokémon catch rate than a standard Poké Ball.

name: Poke Ball
description: A device for catching wild Pokémon. It’s thrown like a ball at a Pokémon, comfortably encapsulating its target.

name: Safari Ball
description: A special Poké Ball that was used in the Safari Zone in the Kanto region and in the Great Marsh in the Sinnoh region.

name: Net Ball
description: A somewhat different Poké Ball that is more effective when catching Water- or Bug-type Pokémon.

name: Dive Ball
description: A somewhat different Poké Ball that is more effective when catching Pokémon in or on the water.

name: Nest Ball
description: A somewhat different Poké Ball that becomes more effective the lower the level of the wild Pokémon.

name: Repeat Ball
description: A somewhat different Poké Ball that works especially well on a Pokémon species that has been caught before.

name: Timer Ball
description: A somewhat different Poké Ball that becomes progressively better the more turns there are in a battle.

name: Luxury Ball
description: A particularly comfortable Poké Ball that makes a wild Pokémon quickly grow friendlier after being caught.

name: Premier Ball
description: A somewhat rare Poké Ball made to commemorate a special occasion of some sort.

name: Dusk Ball
description: A somewhat different Poké Ball that is more effective when catching Pokémon at night or in dark places like caves.

name: Heal Ball
description: A remedial Poké Ball that restores HP and eliminates status conditions for a Pokémon caught with it.

name: Quick Ball
description: A somewhat different Poké Ball that is more effective at catching Pokémon when used first thing in a battle.

name: Cherish Ball
description: A quite rare Poké Ball made to commemorate a special occasion of some sort.

name: Potion
description: A spray-type medicine for treating wounds. It can be used to restore 20 HP to a Pokémon.

name: Antidote
description: A spray-type medicine for poisoning. It can be used once to lift the effects of being poisoned from a Pokémon.

name: Burn Heal
description: A spray-type medicine for treating burns. It can be used to cure a Pokémon suffering from a burn.

name: Ice Heal
description: A spray-type medicine for treating freezing. It can be used to thaw out a Pokémon that has been frozen solid.

name: Awakening
description: A spray-type medicine to wake the sleeping. It can be used to rouse a Pokémon from the clutches of sleep.

name: Paralyze Heal
description: A spray-type medicine for treating paralysis. It can be used to free a Pokémon that has been paralyzed.

name: Full Restore
description: A medicine that can be used to fully restore the max HP of a Pokémon and cure any status conditions it may have.
effect: Restores 255 HP; Cures Sleep, Poison, Burn, Freeze, Paralysis, Confusion

name: Max Potion
description: A spray-type medicine for treating wounds. It can be used to fully restore the max HP of a Pokémon.

name: Hyper Potion
description: A spray-type medicine for treating wounds. It can be used to restore 200 HP to a Pokémon.

name: Super Potion
description: A spray-type medicine for treating wounds. It can be used to restore 50 HP to a Pokémon.

name: Full Heal
description: A spray-type medicine that is broadly effective. It can be used to cure any status condition a Pokémon may have.
effect: Cures Sleep, Poison, Burn, Freeze, Paralysis, Confusion

name: Revive
description: A medicine that can be used to revive a Pokémon that has fainted. It also restores half the Pokémon’s max HP.

name: Max Revive
description: A medicine that can be used to revive a Pokémon that has fainted. It also fully restores the Pokémon’s max HP.

name: Fresh Water
description: Water with high mineral content. It can be used to restore 30 HP to a Pokémon.

name: Soda Pop
description: A highly carbonated soda drink. It can be used to restore 50 HP to a Pokémon.

name: Lemonade
description: A very sweet and refreshing drink. It can be used to restore 70 HP to a Pokémon.

name: Moomoo Milk
description: A bottle of highly nutritious milk. It can be used to restore 100 HP to a Pokémon.

name: Energy Powder
description: A very bitter medicinal powder. It can be used to restore 60 HP to a Pokémon.

name: Energy Root
description: A very bitter medicinal root. It can be used to restore 120 HP to a Pokémon.

name: Heal Powder
description: A very bitter medicinal powder. It can be used to cure any status condition a Pokémon may have.
effect: Cures Sleep, Poison, Burn, Freeze, Paralysis, Confusion; Lowers friendship

name: Revival Herb
description: A terribly bitter medicinal herb. It revives a fainted Pokémon and fully restores its max HP.

name: Ether
description: A medicine that can be used to restore 10 PP to a single move that a Pokémon knows.

name: Max Ether
description: A medicine that can be used to fully restore the max PP of a single move that a Pokémon knows.

name: Elixir
description: A medicine that can be used to restore 10 PP to all four moves that a Pokémon knows.

name: Max Elixir
description: A medicine that can be used to fully restore the max PP of all four moves that a Pokémon knows.

name: Lava Cookie
description: Lavaridge Town’s local specialty. It can be used to cure any status condition a Pokémon may have.
effect: Cures Sleep, Poison, Burn, Freeze, Paralysis, Confusion

name: Berry Juice
description: A 100 percent pure juice made from Berries. It can be used to restore 20 HP to a Pokémon.

name: Sacred Ash
description: Ash that can be used to revive all party Pokémon that have fainted. It also fully restores the Pokémon’s max HP.
effect: Restores 255 HP; Revives a fainted Pokémon; Revives all fainted Pokémon

name: Hp Up
description: A nutritious drink for Pokémon. This drink increases base points for a Pokémon’s HP stat.

name: Protein
description: A nutritious drink for Pokémon. This drink increases base points for a Pokémon’s Attack stat.

name: Iron
description: A nutritious drink for Pokémon. This drink increases base points for a Pokémon’s Defense stat.

name: Carbos
description: A nutritious drink for Pokémon. This drink increases base points for a Pokémon’s Speed stat.

name: Calcium
description: A nutritious drink for Pokémon. This drink increases base points for a Pokémon’s Sp. Atk stat.

name: Rare Candy
description: A candy that is packed with energy. If consumed, it raises a Pokémon’s level by one.

name: Pp Up
description: A medicine that can be used to slightly raise the max PP of a single move that a Pokémon knows.

name: Zinc
description: A nutritious drink for Pokémon. This drink increases base points for a Pokémon’s Sp. Def stat.

name: Pp Max
description: A medicine that can be used to raise the max PP of a single move that a Pokémon knows as high as it can possibly go.

name: Old Gateau
description: A hidden gem found in the Old Chateau. It can be used to cure any status condition a Pokémon may have.
effect: Cures Sleep, Poison, Burn, Freeze, Paralysis, Confusion

name: Guard Spec
description: An item that prevents Pokémon on your side from having their stats lowered in battle for five turns.

name: Dire Hit
description: An item that raises the critical-hit ratio. It can be used only once and wears off if the Pokémon is withdrawn.

name: X Attack
description: An item that boosts the Attack stat of a Pokémon during battle. It wears off once the Pokémon is withdrawn.

name: X Defense
description: An item that boosts the Defense stat of a Pokémon during battle. It wears off once the Pokémon is withdrawn.

name: X Speed
description: An item that boosts the Speed stat of a Pokémon during battle. It wears off once the Pokémon is withdrawn.

name: X Accuracy
description: An item that boosts the Accuracy stat of a Pokémon during battle. It wears off once the Pokémon is withdrawn.

name: X Sp Atk
description: An item that boosts the Sp. Atk stat of a Pokémon during battle. It wears off once the Pokémon is withdrawn.

name: X Sp Def
description: An item that boosts the Sp. Def stat of a Pokémon during battle. It wears off once the Pokémon is withdrawn.

name: Poke Doll
description: A doll that attracts the attention of Pokémon. It guarantees escape from any battle with wild Pokémon.

name: Fluffy Tail
description: A toy that attracts the attention of Pokémon. It guarantees escape from any battle with wild Pokémon.

name: Blue Flute
description: A flute made from blue glass. It awakens sleeping Pokémon.

name: Yellow Flute
description: A flute made from yellow glass. It snaps Pokémon out of confusion.

name: Red Flute
description: A flute made from red glass. It snaps Pokémon out of infatuation.

name: Black Flute
description: A flute made from black glass. It makes it easier to encounter high-level Pokémon in the place you use it.

name: White Flute
description: A flute made from white glass. It makes it easier to encounter low-level Pokémon in the place you use it.

name: Shoal Salt
description: Salt that was found inside Shoal Cave.

name: Shoal Shell
description: A seashell that was found inside Shoal Cave.

name: Red Shard
description: A small red shard. It appears to be a fragment of some sort of implement made long ago.

name: Blue Shard
description: A small blue shard. It appears to be a fragment of some sort of implement made long ago.

name: Yellow Shard
description: A small yellow shard. It appears to be a fragment of some sort of implement made long ago.

name: Green Shard
description: A small green shard. It appears to be a fragment of some sort of implement made long ago.

name: Super Repel
description: An item that prevents low-level wild Pokémon from jumping out at you for a time. It lasts longer than Repel.

name: Max Repel
description: An item that prevents low-level wild Pokémon from jumping out at you for a time. It lasts longer than Super Repel.

name: Escape Rope
description: A long and durable rope. Use it to escape instantly from locations like caves or dungeons.

name: Repel
description: An item that prevents low-level wild Pokémon from jumping out at you for a short time.

name: Sun Stone
description: A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokémon evolve. It burns as red as the evening sun.

name: Moon Stone
description: A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokémon evolve. It is dark like the night sky.

name: Fire Stone
description: A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokémon evolve. It has a fiery orange heart.

name: Thunder Stone
description: A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokémon evolve. It has a distinct thunderbolt pattern.

name: Water Stone
description: A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokémon evolve. It is the clear blue of a deep pool.

name: Leaf Stone
description: A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokémon evolve. It has an unmistakable leaf pattern.

name: Tiny Mushroom
description: A small and rare mushroom. It’s quite popular with a certain class of collectors.

name: Big Mushroom
description: A large and rare mushroom. It’s extremely popular with a certain class of collectors.

name: Pearl
description: A rather small pearl that has a nice silvery sheen to it. It can be sold at a low price to shops.

name: Big Pearl
description: A rather large pearl that has a nice silvery sheen to it. It can be sold at a high price to shops.

name: Stardust
description: Lovely red sand that flows between the fingers with a loose, silky feel. It can be sold at a low price to shops.

name: Star Piece
description: A small shard of a beautiful gem that gives off a distinctly red sparkle. It can be sold at a high price to shops.

name: Nugget
description: A nugget of pure gold that gives off a lustrous gleam. It can be sold at a high price to shops.

name: Heart Scale
description: A pretty, heart-shaped scale that is extremely rare. Certain people are delighted to be given one of these.

name: Honey
description: Honey collected thanks to Pokémon’s efforts. It has a sweet aroma and can be sold at a low price to shops.

name: Growth Mulch
description: A fertilizer to be spread on soft soil. It speeds up the growth of Berries. However, it also dries the soil faster.

name: Damp Mulch
description: A fertilizer to be spread on soft soil. It slows the growth of Berries and causes the soil to dry slower.

name: Stable Mulch
description: A fertilizer to be spread on soft soil. It extends the time ripened Berries remain on their plants before falling.

name: Gooey Mulch
description: A fertilizer to be spread on soft soil. It ups the number of times new plants grow where mature plants withered.

name: Root Fossil
description: A fossil from a prehistoric Pokémon that once lived in the sea. It appears to be part of a plant’s root.

name: Claw Fossil
description: A fossil from a prehistoric Pokémon that once lived in the sea. It appears to be a fragment of a claw.

name: Helix Fossil
description: A fossil from a prehistoric Pokémon that once lived in the sea. It might be a piece of a seashell.

name: Dome Fossil
description: A fossil from a prehistoric Pokémon that once lived in the sea. It could be a shell or carapace.

name: Old Amber
description: A piece of amber that contains the genetic material of an ancient Pokémon. It’s clear with a tawny, reddish tint.

name: Armor Fossil
description: A fossil from a prehistoric Pokémon that once lived on the land. It appears to be part of a protective collar.

name: Skull Fossil
description: A fossil from a prehistoric Pokémon that once lived on the land. It appears as though it’s part of a head.

name: Rare Bone
description: A rare bone that is extremely valuable for the study of Pokémon archeology. It can be sold at a high price to shops.

name: Shiny Stone
description: A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokémon evolve. It shines with a dazzling light.

name: Dusk Stone
description: A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokémon evolve. It holds dark shadows within it.

name: Dawn Stone
description: A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokémon evolve. It sparkles like a glittering eye.

name: Oval Stone
description: A peculiar stone that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It is round and smooth.

name: Odd Keystone
description: A vital item that is needed to keep a stone tower from collapsing. Voices can be heard from it occasionally.

name: Griseous Orb
description: A shining gem to be held by Giratina. It boosts the power of Giratina’s Dragon- and Ghost-type moves.

name: Tea
description: Aromatic tea that has a slightly bitter taste. It soothes a dry throat.

name: Autograph
description: The autograph you got from the Vermilion City Gym Leader, Lt. Surge. He wrote, “Good luck!“

name: Douse Drive

name: Shock Drive

name: Burn Drive

name: Chill Drive

name: Sweet Heart

name: Adamant Orb

name: Lustrous Orb

name: Bright Powder
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It casts a tricky glare that lowers the opposing Pokémon’s accuracy.

name: White Herb

name: Macho Brace

name: Exp Share

name: Quick Claw

name: Soothe Bell

name: Smoke Ball

name: Everstone

name: Focus Band

name: Lucky Egg

name: Twisted Spoon
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. Imbued with telekinetic power, the spoon boosts the power of Psychic-type moves.

name: Charcoal
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a combustible fuel that boosts the power of Fire-type moves.

name: Dragon Fang
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This hard, sharp fang boosts the power of the holder’s Dragon-type moves.

name: Silk Scarf
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a sumptuous scarf that boosts the power of Normal-type moves.

name: Up Grade
description: A transparent device somehow filled with all sorts of data. It was produced by Silph Co.

name: Shell Bell
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. The holder restores a little HP every time it inflicts damage on others.

name: Sea Incense
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This incense has a curious aroma that boosts the power of Water-type moves.

name: Lax Incense
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. The curious aroma of this incense may cause moves to miss its holder.

name: Lucky Punch
description: An item to be held by Chansey. This lucky boxing glove boosts the critical-hit ratio of Chansey’s moves.

name: Metal Powder
description: An item to be held by Ditto. Extremely fine yet hard, this odd powder boosts Ditto’s Defense stat.

name: Thick Club
description: An item to be held by Cubone or Marowak. This hard bone of unknown origin boosts their Attack stat.

name: Leek
description: An item to be held by Farfetch’d. This very long and stiff stalk of leek boosts its critical-hit ratio.

name: Red Scarf
description: When a Pokémon holds this during a contest, it looks even cooler than usual.

name: Blue Scarf
description: When a Pokémon holds this during a contest, it looks even more beautiful than usual.

name: Pink Scarf
description: When a Pokémon holds this during a contest, it looks even cuter than usual.

name: Green Scarf
description: When a Pokémon holds this during a contest, it looks even cleverer than usual.

name: Yellow Scarf
description: When a Pokémon holds this during a contest, it looks even tougher than usual.

name: Wide Lens
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a magnifying lens that slightly boosts the accuracy of moves.

name: Muscle Band
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This headband exudes strength, slightly boosting the power of physical moves.

name: Wise Glasses
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This thick pair of glasses slightly boosts the power of special moves.

name: Expert Belt
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a well-worn belt that slightly boosts the power of supereffective moves.

name: Light Clay
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. Protective moves like Light Screen and Reflect will be effective longer.

name: Life Orb
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts the power of moves but at the cost of some HP on each hit.

name: Power Herb
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It allows the instant use of a move that charges on the first turn--but only once.

name: Toxic Orb
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a bizarre orb that will badly poison the holder during battle.

name: Flame Orb
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a bizarre orb that will afflict the holder with a burn during battle.

name: Quick Powder
description: An item to be held by Ditto. Extremely fine yet hard, this odd powder boosts Ditto’s Speed stat.

name: Focus Sash
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. If it has full HP, the holder will endure one potential KO attack, leaving 1 HP.

name: Zoom Lens
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder acts after its target, its move will be more accurate than usual.

name: Metronome
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts moves used consecutively but only until a different move is used.

name: Iron Ball
description: A Pokémon held item that cuts Speed. It makes Flying-type and levitating holders susceptible to Ground moves.

name: Lagging Tail
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is tremendously heavy and makes the holder move slower than usual.

name: Destiny Knot
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the holder becomes infatuated, the opposing Pokémon will be, too.

name: Black Sludge
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It gradually restores HP to Poison-type Pokémon. It damages any other type.

name: Icy Rock
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the weather changes to snow, it will persist longer than usual.

name: Smooth Rock
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the weather changes to sandstorm, it will persist longer than usual.

name: Heat Rock
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the weather changes to harsh sunlight, it will persist longer than usual.

name: Damp Rock
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the weather changes to rain, it will persist longer than usual.

name: Grip Claw
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It extends the duration of multi-turn attacks, such as Bind and Wrap.

name: Choice Scarf
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This curious scarf boosts Speed but only allows the use of one move.

name: Sticky Barb
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It damages the holder every turn and may latch on to Pokémon that touch the holder.

name: Power Bracer
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It reduces Speed but allows the holder’s Attack stat to grow more after battling.

name: Power Belt
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It reduces Speed but allows the holder’s Defense stat to grow more after battling.

name: Power Lens
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It reduces Speed but allows the holder’s Sp. Atk stat to grow more after battling.

name: Power Band
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It reduces Speed but allows the holder’s Sp. Def stat to grow more after battling.

name: Power Anklet
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It reduces Speed but allows the holder’s Speed stat to grow more after battling.

name: Power Weight
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It reduces Speed but allows the holder’s HP stat to grow more after battling.

name: Shed Shell
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This discarded carapace enables the holder to switch out of battle without fail.

name: Big Root
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts the amount of HP the holder restores from HP-stealing moves.

name: Choice Specs
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. These curious glasses boost Sp. Atk but only allow the use of one move.

name: Flame Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a stone tablet that boosts the power of Fire-type moves.

name: Splash Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a stone tablet that boosts the power of Water-type moves.

name: Zap Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a stone tablet that boosts the power of Electric-type moves.

name: Meadow Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a stone tablet that boosts the power of Grass-type moves.

name: Icicle Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a stone tablet that boosts the power of Ice-type moves.

name: Fist Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a stone tablet that boosts the power of Fighting-type moves.

name: Toxic Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a stone tablet that boosts the power of Poison-type moves.

name: Earth Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a stone tablet that boosts the power of Ground-type moves.

name: Sky Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a stone tablet that boosts the power of Flying-type moves.

name: Mind Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a stone tablet that boosts the power of Psychic-type moves.

name: Insect Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a stone tablet that boosts the power of Bug-type moves.

name: Stone Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a stone tablet that boosts the power of Rock-type moves.

name: Spooky Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a stone tablet that boosts the power of Ghost-type moves.

name: Draco Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a stone tablet that boosts the power of Dragon-type moves.

name: Dread Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a stone tablet that boosts the power of Dark-type moves.

name: Iron Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a stone tablet that boosts the power of Steel-type moves.

name: Odd Incense
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This incense has a curious aroma that boosts the power of Psychic-type moves.

name: Rock Incense
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This incense has a curious aroma that boosts the power of Rock-type moves.

name: Full Incense
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This incense has a curious aroma that makes the holder move slower than usual.

name: Wave Incense
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This incense has a curious aroma that boosts the power of Water-type moves.

name: Rose Incense
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This incense has a curious aroma that boosts the power of Grass-type moves.

name: Luck Incense
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It doubles any prize money received as long as the holder joins the battle at least once.

name: Pure Incense
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It helps keep wild Pokémon away when the holder is the head of the party.

name: Protector
description: A protective item of some sort. It is extremely stiff and heavy. It’s loved by a certain Pokémon.

name: Electirizer
description: A box packed with a tremendous amount of electric energy. It’s loved by a certain Pokémon.

name: Magmarizer
description: A box packed with a tremendous amount of magma energy. It’s loved by a certain Pokémon.

name: Dubious Disc
description: A transparent device overflowing with dubious data. It’s loved by a certain Pokémon.

name: Reaper Cloth
description: A cloth imbued with horrifyingly strong spiritual energy. It’s loved by a certain Pokémon.

name: Razor Claw
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This sharply hooked claw boosts the critical-hit ratio of the holder’s moves.

name: Razor Fang
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder successfully inflicts damage, the target may also flinch.

name: Tm001
description: The user focuses its mind before launching this attack. It will fail if the user is hit before it is used.

name: Tm002
description: Sharp, huge claws hook and slash the foe quickly and with great power.

name: Tm003
description: The foe is hit with a pulsing blast of water. It may also confuse the target.

name: Tm004
description: The user quietly focuses its mind and calms its spirit to raise its Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats.

name: Tm005
description: The foe is scared off, to be replaced by another Pokémon in its party. In the wild, the battle ends.

name: Tm006
description: A move that leaves the foe badly poisoned. This poison damage worsens every turn.

name: Tm007
description: Summons a hailstorm that lasts for five turns. The hailstorm damages all types except Ice.

name: Tm008
description: The user tenses its muscles to bulk up its body, boosting both its Attack and Defense stats.

name: Tm009
description: The user forcefully shoots seeds at the foe. Two to five seeds are shot in rapid succession.

name: Tm010
description: A variable move that changes type and power depending on the hidden ability of the Pokémon using it.

name: Tm011
description: The user intensifies the sun for five turns, powering up Fire-type moves.

name: Tm012
description: The foe is taunted into a rage that allows it to use only attack moves for two to four turns.

name: Tm013
description: The foe is struck with an icy-cold beam of energy. It may also freeze the target solid.

name: Tm014
description: A howling blizzard is summoned to strike the foe. It may also freeze the target solid.

name: Tm015
description: The foe is attacked with a powerful beam. The user must rest on the next turn to regain its energy.

name: Tm016
description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to suppress damage from special attacks for five turns.

name: Tm017
description: It enables the user to evade all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

name: Tm018
description: The user summons a heavy rain that falls for five turns, powering up Water-type moves.

name: Tm019
description: A nutrient-draining attack. The user’s HP is restored by half the damage taken by the target.

name: Tm020
description: The user creates a protective field that prevents status problems like poison, paralysis, burn, and sleep.

name: Tm021
description: A full-power attack that grows more powerful the less the user likes its Trainer.

name: Tm022
description: A two-turn attack. The user gathers light, then blasts a bundled beam on the second turn.

name: Tm023
description: The foe is slammed with a sturdy tail of steel. It may also lower the target’s Defense stat if it hits.

name: Tm024
description: A strong electric blast is loosed at the foe. It may also leave the foe paralyzed.

name: Tm025
description: A wicked thunderbolt is dropped on the foe to inflict damage. It may also leave the target paralyzed.

name: Tm026
description: The user sets off an earthquake that hits all the Pokémon in the battle.

name: Tm027
description: A full-power attack that grows more powerful the more the user likes its Trainer.

name: Tm028
description: The user burrows, then attacks on the second turn. It can also be used to exit dungeons.

name: Tm029
description: The foe is hit by a strong telekinetic force. It may also reduce the foe’s Sp. Def stat.

name: Tm030
description: The user hurls a shadowy blob at the foe. It may also lower the foe’s Sp. Def stat.

name: Tm031
description: The user attacks with tough fists, etc. It can also break any barrier such as Light Screen and Reflect.

name: Tm032
description: The user begins moving so quickly that it creates illusory copies to raise its evasiveness.

name: Tm033
description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to suppress damage from physical attacks for five turns.

name: Tm034
description: The user strikes the foe with a quick jolt of electricity. This attack cannot be evaded.

name: Tm035
description: The foe is scorched with an intense blast of fire. The target may also be left with a burn.

name: Tm036
description: Unsanitary sludge is hurled at the foe. It may also poison the target.

name: Tm037
description: A five-turn sandstorm is summoned to hurt all combatants except the Rock, Ground, and Steel types.

name: Tm038
description: The foe is attacked with an intense blast of all-consuming fire. It may also leave the target with a burn.

name: Tm039
description: Large boulders are hurled at the foe to inflict damage. It lowers the foe’s Speed.

name: Tm040
description: The user confounds the foe with speed, then strikes. The attack lands without fail.

name: Tm041
description: The user torments and enrages the foe, making it incapable of using the same move twice in a row.

name: Tm042
description: An attack move that doubles its power if the user is poisoned, paralyzed, or has a burn.

name: Tm043
description: An attack move with effects that vary depending on the user’s environment.

name: Tm044
description: The user goes to sleep for two turns. It fully restores the user’s HP and heals any status problem.

name: Tm045
description: If it is the opposite gender of the user, the foe becomes infatuated and less likely to attack.

name: Tm046
description: The user attacks and steals the foe’s held item simultaneously. It can’t steal if the user holds an item.

name: Tm047
description: The foe is hit with wings of steel. It may also raise the user’s Defense stat.

name: Tm048
description: The user employs its psychic power to exchange abilities with the foe.

name: Tm049
description: The user steals the effects of any healing or status-changing move the foe attempts to use.

name: Tm050
description: The user attacks the foe at full power using fiery energy. It also sharply reduces the user’s Sp. Atk.

name: Tm051
description: The user lands and rests its body. It restores the user’s HP by up to half of its max HP.

name: Tm052
description: The user attacks at full power. It may also lower the foe’s Sp. Def stat if it hits.

name: Tm053
description: The user draws power from nature and fires it at the foe. It may also lower the target’s Sp. Def.

name: Tm054
description: A restrained attack that prevents the foe from fainting. The target is left with at least 1 HP.

name: Tm055
description: If the foe’s HP is down to under half, this attack will hit with double the power.

name: Tm056
description: The user flings its held item at the foe to attack. Its power and effects depend on the item.

name: Tm057
description: The user attacks with an electric charge. The user may use any remaining electricity to raise its Sp. Atk stat.

name: Tm058
description: The user endures any attack, leaving 1 HP. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

name: Tm059
description: The foe is attacked with a shock wave generated by the user’s gaping mouth.

name: Tm060
description: An energy-draining punch. The user’s HP is restored by half the damage taken by the target.

name: Tm061
description: The user shoots a sinister, bluish white flame at the foe to inflict a burn.

name: Tm062
description: The foe is attacked with powdery scales blown by wind. It may also raise all the user’s stats.

name: Tm063
description: It prevents the foe from using its held item. Its Trainer is also prevented from using items on it.

name: Tm064
description: The user explodes to inflict damage on all Pokémon in battle. The user faints upon using this move.

name: Tm065
description: The user slashes with a sharp claw made from shadows. It has a high critical-hit ratio.

name: Tm066
description: The user stores power, then attacks. If the user can use this attack after the foe, its power is doubled.

name: Tm067
description: The user recycles a single-use item that has been used in battle so it can be used again.

name: Tm068
description: The user charges the foe using every bit of its power. It must rest on the next turn to recover.

name: Tm069
description: The user polishes its body to reduce drag. It sharply raises the Speed stat.

name: Tm070
description: The user flashes a light that cuts the foe’s accuracy. It can also be used to illuminate caves.

name: Tm071
description: The user stabs the foe with a sharpened stone from below. It has a high critical-hit ratio.

name: Tm072
description: An attack move that inflicts double the damage if the user has been hurt by the foe in the same turn.

name: Tm073
description: A weak electric charge is launched at the foe. It causes paralysis if it hits.

name: Tm074
description: The user tackles the foe from a high-speed spin. The slower the user, the greater the damage.

name: Tm075
description: A frenetic dance to uplift the fighting spirit. It sharply raises the user’s Attack stat.

name: Tm076
description: The user lays a trap of levitating stones around the foe. The trap hurts foes that switch into battle.

name: Tm077
description: The user hypnotizes itself into copying any stat change made by the foe.

name: Tm078
description: If it is the opposite gender of the user, the foe is charmed into sharply lowering its Sp. Atk stat.

name: Tm079
description: The user releases a horrible aura imbued with dark thoughts. It may also make the target flinch.

name: Tm080
description: Large boulders are hurled at the foe to inflict damage. It may also make the target flinch.

name: Tm081
description: The user slashes at the foe by crossing its scythes or claws as if they were a pair of scissors.

name: Tm082
description: While it is asleep, the user randomly uses one of the moves it knows.

name: Tm083
description: The user draws power from the Berry it is holding to attack. The Berry determines its type and power.

name: Tm084
description: The foe is stabbed with a tentacle or arm steeped with poison. It may also poison the foe.

name: Tm085
description: An attack that works only on a sleeping foe. It absorbs half the damage caused to heal the user’s HP.

name: Tm086
description: The user snares the foe with grass and trips it. The heavier the foe, the greater the damage.

name: Tm087
description: The user enrages the foe into confusion. However, it also sharply raises the foe’s Attack stat.

name: Tm088
description: The user pecks the foe. If the foe is holding a Berry, the user plucks it and gains its effect.

name: Tm089
description: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

name: Tm090
description: The user makes a copy of itself using some of its HP. The copy serves as the user’s decoy.

name: Tm091
description: The user gathers all its light energy and releases it in one shot. It may also lower the foe’s Sp. Def stat.

name: Tm092
description: The user creates a bizarre space in which slower Pokémon get to move first for five turns.

name: Hm01
description: The foe is cut with a scythe or a claw. It can also be used to cut down thin trees.

name: Hm02
description: The user soars, then strikes on the second turn. It can also be used to fly to any familiar town.

name: Hm03
description: It swamps the entire battlefield with a giant wave. It can also be used to cross water.

name: Hm04
description: The foe is slugged with a punch thrown at maximum power. It can also be used to move boulders.

name: Hm05
description: Traps foes in a violent swirling whirlpool. It can also be used to traverse whirlpools.

name: Hm06
description: The user slugs the foe with a shattering punch. It can also smash cracked boulders.

name: Hm07
description: The user charges the foe at an awesome speed. It can also be used to climb a waterfall.

name: Hm08
description: A charging attack that may also leave the foe confused. It can also be used to scale rocky walls.

name: Loot Sack
description: A sturdy, spacious bag that is used to carry any treasures or loot obtained in the coal mine.

name: Rule Book
description: It lists the rules for holding battles. For Link Battles, you may choose which set of rules you wish to use.

name: Poke Radar
description: A tool that can search out Pokémon that are hiding in the tall grass. Its battery is recharged as you walk.

name: Point Card
description: A card that lists how many Battle Points you have earned.

name: Guidebook
description: A notebook that keeps a record of your adventure so far.

name: Seal Case
description: A case for storing Stickers that can be applied to Ball Capsules.

name: Fashion Case
description: A wondrous, pretty case to store lots of colorful Props for your Pokémon to wear in a musical.

name: Sticker Bag
description: A tiny bag that can hold 10 Stickers for decorating Ball Capsules.

name: Pal Pad
description: A convenient notepad that is used to register your friends and keep a record of your gameplay.

name: Works Key
description: A large key for operating the doors of the Valley Windworks in the canyon. It was held by a Team Galactic Grunt.

name: Old Charm
description: An ancient good-luck charm made of Pokémon bones to be taken to the elder of Celestic Town.

name: Galactic Key
description: A card key for disengaging the security systems in the Galactic HQ. Losing it can result in punishment, apparently.

name: Red Chain
description: A mythical chain that is said to bind the Legendary Pokémon that created the Sinnoh region.

name: Town Map
description: A very convenient map that can be viewed anytime. It even shows you your present location in the region.

name: Vs Seeker
description: A device that indicates Trainers who want to battle. Its battery charges while you walk.

name: Coin Case
description: A case for holding coins obtained at the Game Corner. It can hold up to 50,000 coins.

name: Old Rod
description: An old and beat-up fishing rod. Use it at bodies of water to fish for Pokémon.

name: Good Rod
description: A new, good-quality fishing rod. Use it at bodies of water to fish for Pokémon.

name: Super Rod
description: An awesome, high-spec fishing rod. Use it at bodies of water to fish for Pokémon.

name: Sprayduck
description: A watering can shaped like a Psyduck. It helps promote the healthy growth of any Berries planted in good, soft soil.

name: Poffin Case
description: A case for storing Poffins cooked from Berries.

name: Bike
description: A folding bike that enables a rider to get around much faster than with Running Shoes.

name: Suite Key
description: A key to one of the suites at a certain luxury hotel by a lake. For some odd reason, it often disappears.

name: Oaks Letter
description: A letter from Professor Oak. Written in it is a request for you to go to Route 224.

name: Lunar Feather
description: A feather that glows like the moon. It’s said to possess the power to dispel nightmares.

name: Member Card
description: A card needed for entering the inn in Canalave City. Oddly, the last date marked on it was 50 years ago.

name: Azure Flute
description: A flute that puts out echoing sounds that do not seem to be of this world. No one knows who made it or when.

name: Ss Ticket
description: A ticket required for sailing on the high-speed ferry S.S. Aqua. It has a drawing of a ship on it.

name: Contest Pass
description: A pass required for entering Pokémon Contests. It has a drawing of an award ribbon on its front.

name: Magma Stone
description: A stone formed by boulders melting in intensely hot magma, then hardening. Magma remains sealed inside it.

name: Parcel
description: A parcel entrusted into your care. You’re supposed to deliver it to your childhood friend who left Twinleaf Town.

name: Coupon 1
description: A coupon to be exchanged for a Pokémon Watch- Pokétch for short. Three coupons are needed.

name: Coupon 2
description: A coupon to be exchanged for a Pokémon Watch- Pokétch for short. Three coupons are needed.

name: Coupon 3
description: A coupon to be exchanged for a Pokémon Watch- Pokétch for short. Three coupons are needed.

name: Storage Key Sinnoh
description: The key to Team Galactic’s sinister warehouse located at the edge of Veilstone City.

name: Secret Medicine
description: A fantastic medicine dispensed by the pharmacy in Cianwood City. It fully heals a Pokémon of any ailment.

name: Vs Recorder
description: An amazing device that can record a battle between friends or the battles at certain special battle facilities.

name: Gracidea
description: A flower sometimes bundled in bouquets to convey gratitude on special occasions, such as birthdays.

name: Secret Key
description: A high-tech key that has to be used at a specific location. It emits a special electronic signal to open a door.

name: Apricorn Box
description: A handy box where you can store up to 99 of each kind of Apricorn.

name: Unown Report
description: A report of all the discovered kinds of Unown.

name: Berry Pots
description: Portable containers that allow you to easily cultivate Berries anywhere and anytime.

name: Dowsing Machine
description: The latest device for showing the location of hidden items. It’s worn on the head when in use.

name: Blue Card
description: A card to save points for the Buena’s Password show.

name: Slowpoke Tail
description: A very tasty tail of something. It can be sold at a high price to shops.

name: Clear Bell
description: A very old-fashioned bell that makes a gentle ringing sound.

name: Card Key Johto
description: A card key that opens a shutter in the Radio Tower.

name: Basement Key
description: A key that opens a door in the Goldenrod Tunnel.

name: Squirt Bottle
description: A bottle used for watering plants in the Berry Pots.

name: Red Scale
description: A scale from a red Gyarados that appeared at the Lake of Rage. It glows red like a flame.

name: Lost Item
description: The Mime Jr. doll that was lost by the Copycat.

name: Pass
description: A pass required for riding the Magnet Train. It allows you to ride whenever and however much you’d like.

name: Machine Part
description: An important part of a machine that was stolen from the Power Plant.

name: Silver Feather
description: A strange feather that gleams with a silvery color.

name: Rainbow Feather
description: A strange feather that gleams in rainbow colors.

name: Mystery Egg
description: An Egg obtained from Mr. Pokémon. It has a mysterious pattern on it, and what is in the Egg is unknown.

name: Red Apricorn
description: A red Apricorn. It has a pungent scent that assails the nostrils.

name: Yellow Apricorn
description: A yellow Apricorn. It has a light, refreshing scent.

name: Blue Apricorn
description: A blue Apricorn. It has a slightly grassy smell to it.

name: Green Apricorn
description: A green Apricorn. It has a mysterious and aromatic scent.

name: Pink Apricorn
description: A pink Apricorn. It has a pleasantly sweet scent.

name: White Apricorn
description: A white Apricorn. It doesn’t have any aroma at all.

name: Black Apricorn
description: A black Apricorn. It has a smell that cannot be captured in words.

name: Fast Ball
description: A somewhat different Poké Ball that is more effective when catching Pokémon that are usually very quick to run away.

name: Level Ball
description: A somewhat different Poké Ball that becomes more effective the lower the level of the Pokémon compared to your own.

name: Lure Ball
description: A somewhat different Poké Ball that is more effective when catching Pokémon in or on the water.

name: Heavy Ball
description: A somewhat different Poké Ball that becomes more effective the heavier the Pokémon is.

name: Love Ball
description: A somewhat different Poké Ball that is more effective when catching Pokémon of the opposite gender to your own.

name: Jade Orb
description: A shiny green orb that is said to have a deep connection to a legend of the Hoenn region.

name: Lock Capsule

name: Red Orb

name: Tm176
description: The user traps the foe inside a harshly raging sandstorm for two to five turns.

name: Tm177
description: The user looses its grudge on the move last used by the foe by cutting 4 PP from it.

name: Tm178
description: Gravity is intensified for five turns, making moves involving flying unusable and negating Levitation.

name: Tm179
description: A projectile is thrown at the opponent. A flying Pokémon will fall to the ground.

name: Tm180
description: The user tackles the foe with a high-speed spin. The slower the user, the greater the damage.

name: Tm181
description: The user slaps down the foe’s held item, preventing the item from being used during the battle.

name: Tm182
description: The user bites the foe. If the foe is holding a Berry, the user eats it and gains its effect.

name: Tm183
description: The user chomps hard on the foe with its sharp front fangs. It cuts the target’s HP to half.

name: Tm184
description: The user whirls its fists to send a wave of pure vacuum at the foe. This move always goes first.

name: Tm185
description: The user makes a lunge at the target, attacking with full force. This also lowers the target’s Attack stat.

name: Tm186
description: The user fiercely attacks the target using its entire body.

name: Tm187
description: The user launches sharp icicles at the foe. It strikes two to five times in a row.

name: Tm188
description: Boiling water is shot at the foe. It may also cause a burn.

name: Tm189
description: The user slams down with fire. The more the user outweighs the foe, the greater the damage.

name: Tm190
description: The user gathers light on the first turn, then fills a blade with the light’s energy and attacks on the next turn.

name: Tm191
description: The user attacks in an uproar for two to five turns. Over that time, no one can fall asleep.

name: Tm192
description: The user focuses its mind before launching a punch. It will fail if the user is hit before it is used.

name: Tm193
description: An attack move that varies in power and type depending on the weather.

name: Tm194
description: Gliding on the ground, the user attacks the target. This move always goes first on Grassy Terrain.

name: Tm195
description: The user attacks with energy from jealousy. This leaves all opposing Pokémon that have had their stats\rboosted during the turn with a burn.

name: Tm196
description: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

name: Tm197
description: The user slams the target with its wings to inflict damage. The target is hit twice in a row.

name: Tm198
description: The user attacks by controlling the target’s item. This move fails if the foe isn’t holding an item.

name: Tm199
description: The user lashes out to vent its frustration toward the target. This move’s power is doubled if the\ruser’s stats were lowered during this turn.

name: Tm200
description: The user attacks by shooting scales two to five times in a row. This raises Speed but lowers Defense.

name: Tm201
description: The user attacks everything around it and faints upon using this move. This move’s power is boosted on Misty Terrain.

name: Tm202
description: The user adds its HP to the foe’s HP, then equally shares the combined HP with the foe.

name: Tm203
description: The user hypnotizes itself into copying any stat change made by the foe.

name: Tm204
description: A reckless, life- risking tackle. It also damages the user by a fairly large amount, however.

name: Tm205
description: An attack move that cuts down the foe’s HP to equal the user’s HP.

name: Tm206
description: The user stirs up a violent petal blizzard and attacks everything around it.

name: Tm207
description: Spurred by desperation, the user attacks the target. This move’s power is doubled if the user’s previous move failed.

name: Tm208
description: Traps the foe inside a whirlpool that lasts for two to five turns. The user can pass through whirlpools.

name: Tm209
description: The user attacks by shooting out muddy water. It may also lower the foe’s accuracy.

name: Tm210
description: The user electrifies its body and drops onto the target to inflict damage. If this move misses, the user takes damage instead.

name: Tm211
description: The user traps the foe in an electric net. It also lowers the foe’s Speed.

name: Tm212
description: A consecutive three-kick attack that becomes more powerful with each successful hit.

name: Tm213
description: The user properly coaches its ally Pokémon, boosting their Attack and Defense stats.

name: Tm214
description: The area around the user is swamped by a giant sludge wave. It may also poison those hit.

name: Tm215
description: The user throws scorching sand at the target to attack. The target may also be left with a burn.

name: Tm216
description: The user covers the foe with a mass of down that sharply lowers the Attack stat.

name: Tm217
description: Two turns after this move is used, the foe is attacked with a hunk of psychic energy.

name: Tm218
description: The user attacks the target with its psychic power.\rWhen the ground is Psychic Terrain, this move’s power is boosted and it damages all opposing Pokémon.

name: Tm219
description: The user skitters behind the target to attack. This also lowers the target’s Sp. Atk stat.

name: Tm220
description: The user gathers energy from space to raise its Sp. Atk on the first turn, then attacks on the next.

name: Tm221
description: The user attacks the target’s throat, preventing the target from using sound-based moves for two turns.

name: Tm222
description: The user swings its tough tail and attacks opposing Pokémon. This also lowers their Attack stats.

name: Tm223
description: A horrible sound like scraping metal is emitted to sharply reduce the foe’s Sp. Def stat.

name: Tm224
description: A move that works differently for the Ghost type than for all the other types.

name: Tm225
description: The target is crushed with an arm, a claw, or the like to inflict damage. The attack is more powerful the more HP the foe has left.

name: Tm226
description: The user raises its allies’ morale with a draconic cry so that their future attacks have a heightened\rchance of landing critical hits. This rouses Dragon types more.

name: Tm227
description: The user attacks the target using its angelic voice. This also confuses the target if its stats have been boosted during the turn.

name: Tm228
description: The user attacks the target with unpleasant sound waves. For two turns, the target is prevented from\rrecovering HP through moves, Abilities, or held items.

name: Tm229
description: The user reacts to the target’s movement and strikes with the heel of its palm, making the target flinch.\rThis move fails if the target is not readying a priority move.

name: Auspicious Armor
description: A peculiar set of armor that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. Auspicious wishes live within it.

name: Leaders Crest
description: A shard of what appears to be an old blade of some sort. It is held only by Bisharp that head up a group of Pawniard.

name: Fairy Feather
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This feather, which gleams faintly in the light, boosts the power of Fairy-type moves.

name: Syrupy Apple
description: A peculiar apple that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It’s exceptionally syrupy.

name: Unremarkable Teacup
description: A teacup that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It may be cracked, but tea drunk from it is delicious.

name: Masterpiece Teacup
description: A teacup that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It may be chipped, but tea drunk from it is delicious.

name: Cornerstone Mask
description: An item to be held by Ogerpon. This wooden mask is adorned with crystals and allows Ogerpon to wield the Rock type in battle.

name: Wellspring Mask
description: An item to be held by Ogerpon. This wooden mask is adorned with crystals and allows Ogerpon to wield the Water type in battle.

name: Hearthflame Mask
description: An item to be held by Ogerpon. This wooden mask is adorned with crystals and allows Ogerpon to wield the Fire type in battle.

name: Metal Alloy
description: A peculiar metal that can make certain species of Pokémon evolve. It is composed of many layers.
